# File Reference

- `.github/copilot-instructions.md` ‚Äî entry point and index
- `figma/components/*.figma.ts` ‚Äî component design-contract specs
- `figma/app/.figma-sync/connections.json` ‚Äî code‚ÜîFigma mappings
- `figma/app/figma.config.json` ‚Äî project config
- `.figma.config/bridge/src/mcp-server.ts` ‚Äî bridge MCP tool definitions
- `.figma.config/bridge/src/server.ts` ‚Äî bridge websocket server
- `.figma.config/plugin/code.ts` ‚Äî plugin command handlers
- `.vscode/mcp.json` ‚Äî MCP server wiring
- `src/` ‚Äî runtime/product app code
